name: Autoformer
full_name: Decomposition transformers with auto-correlation for long-term series forecasting
paper: Autoformer: decomposition transformers with auto-correlation for long-term series forecasting
description: Autoformer is a decomposition architecture with an Auto-Correlation mechanism. This approach break with the pre-processing convention of series decomposition and renovate it as a basic inner block of deep models. This design empowers Autoformer with progressive decomposition capacities for complex time series. Further, the Auto-Correlation mechanism based on the series periodicity, conducts the dependencies discovery and representation aggregation at the sub-series level.
